entries.firstPrompt: Add a dark mode toggle to the settings page. Use system preference as default, persist the choice to localStorage.
entries.summary: Added dark mode with system preference detection. Theme store uses Svelte 5 runes with localStorage persistence. Three-mode toggle on settings page.
entries.nativeSummary: Added dark mode with system preference detection. Theme store uses Svelte 5 runes with localStorage persistence. Three-mode toggle on settings page.
entries.lastPrompt: Add a dark mode toggle to the settings page. Use system preference as default, persist the choice to localStorage.

entries.firstPrompt: Search results are showing up blank in the UI. The counter says '12 results' but nothing renders. This started after the dedup PR merged yesterday.
entries.summary: Fixed blank search results caused by async dedup race condition in SSE streaming pipeline. Ripgrep emitting multiple matches per session created duplicates that Svelte's keyed {#each} silently dropped
entries.nativeSummary: Fixed blank search results caused by async dedup race condition in SSE streaming pipeline. Ripgrep emitting multiple matches per session created duplicates that Svelte's keyed {#each} silently dropped.
entries.lastPrompt: Search results are showing up blank in the UI. The counter says '12 results' but nothing renders. This started after the dedup PR merged yesterday.

entries.firstPrompt: The auth middleware is storing session tokens in plain text. Legal flagged this — we need to encrypt tokens at rest and rotate the encryption key monthly. Can you refactor the middleware?
entries.summary: Refactored auth middleware to encrypt session tokens at rest using AES-256-GCM. Created crypto utility module, updated SessionStore to encrypt/decrypt transparently. Key rotation supported via ENCRYPT
entries.nativeSummary: Refactored auth middleware to encrypt session tokens at rest using AES-256-GCM. Created crypto utility module, updated SessionStore to encrypt/decrypt transparently. Key rotation supported via ENCRYPTION_KEY env var.
entries.lastPrompt: The auth middleware is storing session tokens in plain text. Legal flagged this — we need to encrypt tokens at rest and rotate the encryption key monthly. Can you refactor the middleware?
